exact_current_price_paths_found.path: stores and serves latest mark snapshot

exact_current_price_paths_found.role: backend truth surface for current_price + mark_source

exact_current_price_paths_found.path: buildOpenPaperPositions(...) previously seeded current_price from rec?.current_price

root_cause: Frontend open-paper-position construction was seeding current_price from shadow recommendation context (`rec?.current_price`), allowing live card price to flip away from fresh stream-backed backend truth.
source_precedence_after_fix: fresh polymarket_stream mark from backend state/SSE wins
fallback may apply only when stream mark is missing or stale
shadow never writes/overrides live paper card current_price

live_proof_sample.sample_summary: Observed repeated positions_mark payloads with stable mark_source=polymarket_stream and no flip back to a second current_price source.

mark_source_stability: stable as polymarket_stream in the observed live sample
